property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should register a new user successfully

property.name: testLoginUser
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should login user with valid credentials

property.name: testLoginWithWrongUsernameOrPassword
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should reject login with invalid credentials

property.name: testInstitutionShouldCreateEvent
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow institution to create an event

property.name: testInstitutionShouldGetAllEvents
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow institution to fetch all events

property.name: testInstitutionShouldCreateResource
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow institution to create a resource

property.name: testInstitutionShouldGetAllResources
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow institution to fetch all resources

property.name: testInstitutionShouldAllocateResource
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow institution to allocate resources to event

property.name: testEducatorShouldGetAllEventsAgenda
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow educator to view events agenda

property.name: testEducatorShouldUpdateEventMaterial
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow educator to update event materials

property.name: testStudentShouldRegisterForEvent
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow student to register for an event

property.name: testStudentShouldViewRegistrationStatus
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should allow student to view registration status

property.name: testEducatorAndStudentShouldNotAccessInstitutionApi
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should restrict educator and student from institution APIs

property.name: testInstitutionAndStudentShouldNotAccessEducatorApi
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should restrict institution and student from educator APIs

property.name: testInstitutionAndEducatorShouldNotAccessStudentApi
property.value: EducationalResourceDistributionSystemApplicationTests should restrict institution and educator from student APIs

property.name: AddResourceComponent_description_required
property.value: AddResourceComponent should mark description field as required

property.name: AddResourceComponent_resourceType_required
property.value: AddResourceComponent should mark resourceType field as required

property.name: AddResourceComponent_availability_required
property.value: AddResourceComponent should mark availability field as required

property.name: CreateEventComponent_form_invalid_when_empty
property.value: CreateEventComponent should mark form invalid when fields are empty

property.name: CreateEventComponent_form_valid_when_filled
property.value: CreateEventComponent should validate form when all fields are filled

property.name: HttpService_created
property.value: HttpService should be created

property.name: HttpService_getBookingDetails
property.value: HttpService should fetch booking details for student

property.name: HttpService_getAllEvents
property.value: HttpService should fetch all events

property.name: HttpService_getAllResources
property.value: HttpService should fetch all resources

property.name: HttpService_createEvent
property.value: HttpService should create an event

property.name: HttpService_updateEvent
property.value: HttpService should update event materials

property.name: HttpService_addResource
property.value: HttpService should add a resource

property.name: HttpService_allocateResources
property.value: HttpService should allocate resources to an event

property.name: HttpService_login
property.value: HttpService should login user

property.name: HttpService_registerUser
property.value: HttpService should register a new user

property.name: LoginComponent_invalid_empty
property.value: LoginComponent should mark form invalid when username and password are empty

property.name: LoginComponent_invalid_partial
property.value: LoginComponent should mark form invalid when either username or password is empty

property.name: LoginComponent_valid
property.value: LoginComponent should validate form when username and password are provided

property.name: RegistrationComponent_invalid_empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark form invalid when fields are empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent_invalid_email
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark email invalid when format is incorrect

property.name: RegistrationComponent_valid
property.value: RegistrationComponent should validate form when all fields are filled correctly

property.name: ResourceAllocateComponent_eventId_required
property.value: ResourceAllocateComponent should mark form invalid when eventId is empty

property.name: ResourceAllocateComponent_resourceId_required
property.value: ResourceAllocateComponent should mark form invalid when resourceId is empty

property.name: ViewEventsComponent_invalid_when_title_empty
property.value: ViewEventsComponent should mark form invalid when title is empty

property.name: ViewEventsComponent_invalid_when_description_empty
property.value: ViewEventsComponent should mark form invalid when description is empty
